info.title: How Inside Sales Works
info.item1: When you create and upload agreements to Bigin, they get a Bigin Deal ID
info.item2: Lisa Rothwell processes these deals, creating audit records
info.item3Prefix: If any of your agreement's Bigin IDs appear in Lisa's audit history within the last year, you are classified as
